queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a determinant of elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigating the risk-mitigating impact of critical credit history accounts and concurrent existing loans on determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of absent checking account status on credit risk drivers and default probability in consumer lending.
